title: Make Melons Watermelon
description: Renames Melons and all related items to be Watermelon
body:
Self Explanitory, Turns Melons and all related items/blocks into Watermelon.

# Changes/Notice
- Might not work with other packs that rename items through a language file.
- Only works with English (For now)
- 1.20 & 1.20.1 tested, may break in older versions (Older version may be supported in the future)

## Items/Blocks Changed
- Melon (Block) -> Watermelon
- Melon Stem (Block) -> Watermelon Stem
- Attached Melon Stem (Block) -> Attached Watermelon Stem
- Melon Slice (Item) -> Watermelon Slice
- Melon Seeds (Item) -> Watermelon Seeds
- Glistering Melon Slice (Item) -> Glistering Watermelon Slice

## Note:
Only language has been changes, no textural changes have been made
